title: Federal Reserve Board - 2021 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This page is an archive index listing FOMC statements, economic projections, and related announcements from 2021. It contains only dates and titles of documents (12/15, 11/3, 9/22, 7/28, 6/16, 4/28, 3/17, 1/27/2021) with no substantive policy content. The actual FOMC statement text and economic projections are not included in this source.
key_points: Page is a dated archive index (last updated February 26, 2026) for 2021 FOMC communications, not a current document
Contains only document titles and dates from eight FOMC meetings in 2021 (January through December)
Lists both FOMC statements and separate economic projections releases for select meetings (March, June, September, December)
Includes a July 28, 2021 Statement Regarding Repurchase Agreement Arrangements
Includes a January 27, 2021 reaffirmation of the Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy
No actual statement text, vote tallies, forward guidance language, or policy decisions are present in this source
why_it_matters: This source is not useful for research purposes. It is merely an archive index page that points to other documents. To access actual FOMC policy decisions, forward guidance, or economic projections, one must retrieve the individual linked documents rather than this index.

issues_found: event_type set to 'unknown' which is appropriate for an index page; however, if individual linked documents are archived later, those should use 'fomc_statement' or 'fomc_projections' as applicable

human_review.notes: The record accurately identifies this as a listing/index page with no substantive policy content. The characterization is well-supported by the source text. Auto-routing is appropriate.

notes: Not relevant for direct research. This is a Federal Reserve archive index page containing only titles and dates of 2021 FOMC documents. The actual FOMC statements from 2021 (particularly the December statement announcing faster taper and updated dot plot) would be the appropriate sources to archive. Source is stale (2021 data in 2026) and contains no extractable policy information. Should be flagged as non-archivable or replaced with individual statement documents.
